summary: Tested voice-to-transaction feature (iteration 11). All 6 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified working. Voice endpoint POST /api/voice/parse-transaction exists and correctly handles auth, file upload, and returns proper response structure with transcript and parsed fields.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting (span in tbody/table) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/voice/parse-transaction endpoint correctly uses emergentintegrations.llm.openai.OpenAISpeechToText for Whisper transcription
Backend uses gpt-4.1-mini model via emergentintegrations.llm.chat.LlmChat for parsing transaction data
Backend correctly handles Spanish language (language='es' in Whisper call)
Backend returns proper response structure: {transcript: string, parsed: {type, category, amount, description, date} | null, error?: string}
Frontend FloatingTransaction.jsx has voice-input-section with data-testid='voice-input-section'
Frontend has microphone button with data-testid='voice-record-btn'
Frontend shows voice hint text 'Di algo como: Gaste 15 mil en Uber hoy'
Frontend uses MediaRecorder API to record audio/webm format
Frontend processAudio function sends audio to backend and auto-fills form with parsed data
seed_data_creation: Test users, sessions, and categories created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested voice-to-transaction feature. Backend endpoint /api/voice/parse-transaction works correctly with Whisper STT + GPT-4.1-mini parsing. Frontend FloatingTransaction dialog has voice input section with microphone button and hint text. All data-testid attributes present. Note: End-to-end voice testing requires actual audio with speech - silent audio returns empty/default transcription.

backend_voice_endpoint_exists.details: Endpoint exists and accepts multipart/form-data with 'file' field

backend_voice_auth_required.details: Returns 401 without authentication, 401 with invalid/expired session

backend_voice_response_structure.details: Returns {transcript: string, parsed: object|null, error?: string}

frontend_voice_input_section.details: Voice input section visible in FloatingTransaction dialog

frontend_microphone_button.details: Microphone button present and styled correctly

frontend_voice_hint_text.details: Shows 'Di algo como: Gaste 15 mil en Uber hoy' hint text

frontend_dialog_opens_correctly.details: Dialog opens when floating button clicked, voice section visible

tests_passed: Backend: Voice endpoint returns 401 without auth
Backend: Voice endpoint returns 422 without file
Backend: Voice endpoint accepts audio file with auth
Backend: Voice endpoint response has correct structure
Backend: Voice endpoint returns 401 with invalid session
Backend: Voice endpoint returns 401 with expired session
Frontend: Voice hint text 'Di algo como' found
Frontend: Income and Expense tabs found
